title: Greenidge Generation Q3 2025 Results - Strong Net Income and Bitcoin Production
text: Greenidge Generation Q3 2025 Financial Results. Revenue and Income: Total Revenue approximately $15.2 million. Net Income approximately $12.0-12.8 million. EBITDA approximately $15.0-16.0 million. Operational Metrics: Bitcoin Production 95 BTC. Cryptocurrency Mining Revenue $4.2 million. Datacenter Hosting Revenue $6.3 million. Power and Capacity Revenue $4.8 million. Cash Flow: Operating Cash Flow approximately $0.1 million. Adjusted Free Cash Flow $4.3 million. Strategic Developments: 83% quarterly increase in power and capacity revenue. Reduced October 2026 senior unsecured debt to $38.0M after tender and exchange offers. Sold a 7.5MW Mississippi facility for $3.9M. Operational Capacity: 119MW of active self-mining hosting and power generation across sites with planned mining capacity of 2.5MW expected in Q2 or Q3 2025 and at least 40MW by Q2 2026. Q3 2025 results demonstrate improved financial performance particularly in power generation revenue alongside continued bitcoin mining operations.
